consent.consent_text: I authorize Demo Toyota to contact me by phone or email to confirm or reschedule my requested test drive of VIN 1HGCY2F57RA000001 on May 3, 2026.

appointment.notes: I have a valid California driver's license and will bring proof of insurance.

message: I'd like to test-drive the 2024 Honda CR-V EX-L (VIN 1HGCY2F57RA000001) on Sunday May 3 at 11:00 AM Pacific.
